description: Style Note Spring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection belt, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops. Product Details Thick brown belt Has a wide oval buckle with text and detailing Has a press clasp with buttons to customise the Fit Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
